page_title: 50% Polyester 50% Cotton Denim Fabric - ArGiyim 360 Denim - Ariteks
spec_line: 360 g/m², 50% Polyester 50% Cotton, Denim Woven Fabric
description_blocks: 50% Polyester 50% Cotton denim twill fabric. The front side of the fabric is polyester which is ultra durable for work conditions and light, the back side of the fabric is cotton which provides breathability to the user.
ArGiyim 360 Denim are used for pants and trousers.

ArGiyim 360 Denim are used for pants and trousers.
